summary: Comprehensive testing of Reversement des Recettes feature with REVERSED workflow. All backend tests passed (10/10). Frontend workflow fully verified: Only 4 payment modes (no Carte Bancaire, no Autres), REVERSED workflow (Gerante signs FIRST, Admin validates AFTER), comparison table with Ecart column, PDF generation after admin validation.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody. This is a React rendering issue but does not affect functionality.

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/revenue-by-payment - NEW endpoint returns revenue by payment method
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/revenue-by-payment?week_start= - filters by week
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/revenue-by-payment?date= - filters by date
✅ Backend: POST /api/financial-points - only 4 payment fields (no card_amount, no other_amount)
✅ Backend: POST /api/financial-points/{id}/sign - Gerante signs FIRST (no admin validation required)
✅ Backend: POST /api/financial-points/{id}/admin-validate - Admin validates AFTER signature (requires signed=true)
✅ Backend: POST /api/financial-points/{id}/unlock - Admin can unlock for modification
✅ Backend: GET /api/financial-points/{id}/pdf - PDF shows 'Reversement des Recettes'
✅ Backend: Full REVERSED workflow: Create → Sign (Gerante) → Validate (Admin)
✅ Backend: Manager can create AND sign financial points
✅ Frontend: Navigate /caisse > Admin login > Hebdo > Point Financier sub-tab
✅ Frontend: Only 4 payment fields visible (Especes, Mobile Money, Cheque, Portefeuille/Credit)
✅ Frontend: NO Carte Bancaire field, NO Autres field
✅ Frontend: Title says 'Reversement des Recettes'
✅ Frontend: 'TOTAL REVERSEMENT' label in total section
✅ Frontend: Comparison table 'Comparaison Reversement / Recettes Point Hebdo' with Ecart column
✅ Frontend: Workflow guide shows: 1. Saisie Gerante → 2. Signature Gerante → 3. Validation Admin & PDF
✅ Frontend: Sign button says 'Signer (Gerante)'
✅ Frontend: Admin sees 'Valider (Admin)' button after signature
✅ Frontend: After full validation: 'Reversement Valide & Verrouille' with PDF buttons
✅ Frontend: Admin controls: 'Autoriser la modification' and 'Supprimer' buttons
✅ Frontend: Manager (PIN 2468) can view but NOT validate, unlock, or delete validated points
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console hydration warnings in HebdoReport table (span inside tbody) - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Created and validated test financial point during testing (95,000 F total)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reversement des Recettes feature fully working with REVERSED workflow. Key changes from previous iteration: (1) Only 4 payment modes - Carte Bancaire and Autres REMOVED, (2) Workflow REVERSED: Gerante signs FIRST, Admin validates AFTER, (3) NEW /reports/revenue-by-payment endpoint for comparison data, (4) Comparison table shows discrepancies between reversement and system-recorded revenue by payment method. All role-based permissions working correctly.

payment_modes.notes: Only 4 modes: Especes, Mobile Money, Cheque, Portefeuille/Credit. NO Carte Bancaire, NO Autres.

reversed_workflow.notes: Gerante signs FIRST (no admin validation required), Admin validates AFTER (requires signed=true)

comparison_table.notes: Shows Reversement vs Recettes (Systeme) with Ecart column for each payment mode

revenue_by_payment_endpoint.notes: NEW endpoint /reports/revenue-by-payment returns validated invoice revenue by payment method

pdf_generation.notes: PDF shows 'Reversement des Recettes' title, available after admin validation

admin_controls.notes: Admin can validate, unlock, and delete. Manager cannot.

manager_permissions.notes: Manager can create and sign, but cannot validate, unlock, or delete

backend_api_tests.GET /api/reports/revenue-by-payment: PASS - Returns revenue by payment method
backend_api_tests.POST /api/financial-points (4 fields onl: PASS - Creates with only 4 payment fields
backend_api_tests.GET /api/financial-points/{id}/pdf: PASS - Returns HTML with Reversement title
